summary.diagnosis:
*Jul 9→Jul 15 vs Jul 2→Jul 8* · Revenue -9% (1,030,405 vs 1,126,168 EGP) · Spend -8% · ROAS 5.73 (-1%).
   • CPC: 2.29 → 2.2 EGP (-4%, ~flat)
   • CVR: 1.14% → 1.04% (-9%, down (drag))
   • AOV: 1,157 → 1,217 EGP (+5%, up (good))
   *Who moved it:* *CVR 50%* of the move (hurt, -99,470 EGP)  ·  *AOV 28%* of the move (helped, +50,820 EGP)  ·  *CPC 22%* of the move (helped, +7,356 EGP).
   *Read:* *CVR* fell -9%, the biggest of the three.
     Worth about *-99,470 EGP of revenue at the same clicks*.
     That drove ROAS -1%.
     Revenue -9% because spend -8%.
   *Deeper:* biggest single mover was *lblb beach bag essentials*, its CVR went 3.59%→2.44% on 9,832 EGP spend (~43% of the swing).
